# SCORE Templates Library

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, templates, worksheets

## Resource purpose
SCORE template library for worksheets and planning outputs.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when the user needs to produce a concrete document, worksheet, plan, projection, or checklist.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All stages.

## Best audience
Entrepreneurs who need practical tools rather than only explanatory articles.

## BOSS routing notes
- For Ideation, start with canvas/offer/customer worksheets; for Formation, business plan and startup budget; for Operations/Growth, cash flow, P&L, SWOT, and business health tools.
- Do not give templates as final legal/tax/financial advice; use them to organize facts for a mentor/professional.

## Related SCORE links
- Template gallery: https://www.score.org/business-planning-financial-statements-template-gallery/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
